proposed_relations.description: 22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Webster Avenue through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT). See the photo below to learn about SBS improvements, which will make bus travel faster and more reliable for the 22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route.

rationale: The block explicitly states 22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route, which corresponds to the existing Bx41 Limited service.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Webster Avenue through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT). See the photo below to learn about SBS improvements, which will make bus travel faster and more reliable for the 22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route.

quarantine.note: The cited block says '22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route' — not 'Bx41 Limited'. The metric's payload also records route as 'Bx41' (not limited-specific). The proposed subject route_bx41-limited-2012-10-webster is specifically the Limited variant (service_variant: limited_stop). The block text does not distinguish whether the 22,000 figure represents the Limited variant alone or the entire Bx41 corridor (local + limited). Attaching this metric to the Limited-specific route record may over-narrow the scope.
